**Project Role Description :** Develop custom software solutions to design, code, and enhance components across systems or applications. Use modern frameworks and agile practices to deliver scalable, high\-performing solutions tailored to specific business needs.
  

**Must have skills :** .Net Full Stack Development  

**Good to have skills :** NA

.Net Full Stack Development  

Job Summary  

We are looking for an experienced and passionate .NET Full Stack Developer to design, develop, and maintain robust, scalable web applications. You will be responsible for end\-to\-end development, translating product requirements into functional, high\-performance software, covering everything from UI/UX design to server\-side logic and database management.
  

Core Responsibilities  

Back\-End Development: Build secure, high\-performance RESTful APIs and server\-side business logic using C\# and ASP.NET Core.  

Front\-End Development: Create responsive, user\-friendly interfaces using modern frameworks such as React, Angular, or Blazor.

Cloud \& DevOps: Containerize applications using Docker and deploy to cloud environments (Azure/AWS), managing CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions/Azure DevOps).  

Testing \& Debugging: Write unit/integration tests (xUnit/NUnit) and troubleshoot issues to ensure seamless functionality.  

Collaboration: Work with UI/UX designers, product managers, and QA teams in an Agile/Scrum environment.
  

Required Skills \& Qualifications  

Back\-End: Deep expertise in C\#, .NET Core/.NET 6\+ and ASP.NET Core.  

Front\-End: Proficiency in HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript/TypeScript, and at least one modern framework (React, Angular, or Blazor).  

Database: Strong knowledge of SQL Server, database design, and ORM tools (Entity Framework Core).  

Version Control: Solid experience with Git and GitHub/GitLab.Tools: Experience with Visual Studio/Visual Studio Code.

title: Frontend Developer (LY-FE02)
description:
At Lemon Yellow, great design deserves great engineering.
   

  

 We bring the design, you bring the tech magic, and together we create UI and UX experiences that make users smile.
   

  

 We are looking for a Frontend Developer who can translate thoughtful design into smooth, scalable, and delightful digital experiences.
   

  

* Core Responsibilities


 Work closely with the design team to translate UI and UX requirements into high quality, functional interfaces.
   

  

 Convert wireframes and mockups into fully interactive, iterative environments.
   

  

 Build responsive, elegant, and accessible web interfaces using modern JavaScript practices.
   

  

 Integrate frontend components with backend APIs and work collaboratively with backend engineers.
   

  

 Ensure layouts are pixel perfect across devices, browsers, and screen sizes.
   

  

 Write clean, reusable, and maintainable code while working with designers, strategists, and developers.
   

  

 Contribute to shaping digital products, features, and enhancements.
   

  

* Interaction and Motion


 Use GSAP or similar tools to create smooth animations and micro\-interactions.
   

  

 Ensure motion enhances user experience without affecting performance.
   

  

 Implement accessible interactions that feel natural and intuitive.
   

  

* API and Integration Management


 Integrate frontend systems with RESTful APIs and backend services.
   

  

 Work with third party tools, plugins, and services as required.
   

  

 Ensure smooth data flow, secure handling, and efficient UI rendering.
   

  

* Code Quality and Optimization


 Debug and optimize interfaces for speed, performance, and reliability.
   

  

 Maintain best practices around component reuse and code organization.
   

  

 Participate in code reviews and contribute to improving internal standards.
   

  

 Ensure cross browser compatibility and responsive breakpoints.
   

  

* Agile Collaboration


 Participate in daily stand ups, sprint planning, retros, and reviews.
   

  

 Contribute to task estimations and collaborate on technical problem solving.
   

  

 Stay responsive to project shifts, timelines, and delivery cycles.
   

  

* Continuous Learning and Innovation


 Stay updated with the latest trends, tools, and practices in the frontend ecosystem.
   

  

 Experiment with new frameworks, libraries, and methodologies.
   

  

 Share learnings with the team and suggest creative, efficient solutions.
   

  

**Requirements**
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field.
* Minimum 1 year of hands\-on frontend development experience.
* Strong proficiency in HTML, SASS CSS, and JavaScript ES6\.
* Expertise in React.js.
* Familiarity with Bootstrap and Tailwind CSS.
* Experience with GSAP for animations.
* Knowledge of WordPress or WebFlow is a plus.
* Hands on experience with GIT and version control workflows.
* Ability to build responsive, user friendly layouts.
* Strong analytical and problem solving skills.
* Attention to detail and love for clean, maintainable code.
* Good collaboration and communication skills.
* Eagerness to learn, experiment, and grow.


**What are we offering?**
**Experience**
 A chance to work on meaningful brands and digital products across industries. Every project brings new learning and opportunities to strengthen your development skills. You grow and you help the team grow.
   

  

**Exposure**
 If you believe in your work, we believe in you. You get to work directly with clients, understand real world problems, and build solutions that create impact.
   

  

**Empathy**
 A thoughtfully nurtured culture that values fun and fulfilment.
   

  

 Your wellbeing, personal, professional, mental, and physical, becomes our priority.
   

  

 From Fitness Thursdays to learning sessions, we make sure you laugh, learn, and feel supported.
   

  

**Who are we?**
 Lemon Yellow LLP is a user centered UI and UX design agency based out of Thane, Maharashtra. With global experience, strong mentorship, and a passionate team, we aim to design digital happiness.
   

  

 You should apply if you believe in building experiences that people enjoy using.
   

  

**How do you reach us?**
 Well, after you send in your application, it takes us 2\-3 weeks to review it. Sometimes, not often, we might delay just a bit beyond that. This happens when our mailbox is flooded with applications.
   

  

 We promise we won’t ghost you, you’ll definitely hear from us. In the meantime, feel free to explore our official website.

title: Full Stack Engineer
description:
**About Us** 




 MIDASX by Vijya Fintech is a premier fintech powerhouse with over 25 years of industry expertise. We provide a high\-speed, intelligent ecosystem designed to transform financial intermediaries—advisors, brokers, and MFDs into data\-driven wealth managers.
 



**The Power of Our Platform:** 




 We don't just manage data; we power growth at scale:
 



**₹2 Lakh\+ Crore:** 
 Assets Under Management (AUM) handled.
 



**2,000\+:** 
 Active professional users.
 



**8 Lakh\+:** 
 Investors served.
 



  





**What do We do?** 




 Our mission is to build the "Amazon of Financial Services"a comprehensive, one\-stop marketplace where every financial tool and product is accessible at your fingertips.
 



 Introducing MIDASX
 



 MIDASX is our flagship AI\-powered, white\-label SaaS platform. It is a multi\-asset marketplace built to eliminate manual bottlenecks and accelerate business growth.
 



**Intelligence:** 
 Predicts client behavior, forecasts attrition, and generates AI\-powered portfolio realignment plans.
 



**Automation:** 
 Handles everything from digital onboarding to complex investment reporting, removing the "boring paperwork."
 



**Visibility :** 
 Offers 360\-degree AUM tracking and deep data insights in a single dashboard.
 



**Efficiency :** 
 Enables professionals to stop being "fund operators" and start being true financial advisors, significantly increasing their earnings and scalability.
 



  





**About the role** 




 We are looking for a relentless problem\-solver who cares more about the outcome than the tech stack to help building the next‑gen, multi‑tenant countrys 1st Multi Asset B2B2C Marketplace.As a tech\-agnostic Full Stack Developer, youll dive into unknown codebases, learn new technologies on the fly, and ship features end\-to\-end. You’ll prototype rapidly, scale existing systems, and take extreme ownership of your work to deliver high\-impact solutions in a fast\-paced, dynamic environment.
 



**What you’ll do** 



* Architect, build, and deploy end\-to\-end web applications, seamlessly context\-switching between frontend and backend.
* Evaluate and adopt the best tools for the job—whether that means writing APIs in Node.js, Python, or Go, and building UIs in Angular React, or Vue.
* Design robust database schemas and write optimized queries across both relational (PostgreSQL, MySQL) and NoSQL (MongoDB, Redis) databases.
* Take full ownership of features from product ideation to production deployment, monitoring, and maintenance.
* Debug complex issues across the entire stack, from browser rendering quirks to API latency and infrastructure bottlenecks.
* Collaborate closely with product managers and designers to iterate quickly and ship high\-quality, maintainable code.



  





  





**Must\-have** 



* 2–5 years of full\-stack software engineering experience delivering scalable production applications.
* True tech\-agnostic mindset: deep foundation in at least one modern stack, coupled with the proven ability to learn new languages and frameworks in days, not months.
* Strong fundamentals in computer science (system design, data structures, clean architecture) and API design (REST/GraphQL).
* Solid understanding of version control (Git), modern web security practices, and basic web infrastructure.
* A "hustler" mentality: you thrive in ambiguity, have a strong bias toward action, and are comfortable navigating changing priorities autonomously.


- 


**Nice\-to\-have** 



* Hands\-on experience with cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and containerization (Docker).
* Familiarity with building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI) and automated testing.
* Previous experience working in a fast\-paced startup or a zero\-to\-one product building environment.
* A portfolio of side projects, hackathon wins, or open\-source contributions that demonstrate your passion for building things.



  





**Why do you like working with us?** 




**Skip the "Beta" Phase:** 
 We’ve been around for 25 years, but we operate like a Day 1 startup. You get the stability of a legacy firm with the "move fast and break things" energy of a fintech.
 



**Direct Equity in Decisions** 
 : In most places, you’re a "contributor." Here, you’re a principal. Your logic doesn't go through five layers of approval; it goes into production.
 



**Complex over Cosmetic:** 
 If you want a job where you just change button colors, this isn't it. We solve "how do I move billions of rupees seamlessly" problems.
 



**Joining Bonus:** 
 Joining us within 30 days of your offer isn't just a win for us, it' s a win for your bank account. Consider it an immediate ROI on your career move that will be discussed at the time of receiving the offer letter .

title: AI Full Stack Engineer
description:

 https://www.godrejindustries.com/
 



  





**Job Description** 




  





 Role: AI Full Stack Engineer – Digital Engineering
 



 Location: Mumbai
 



  





 Experience: 3\-5 Years
 



  





**Role Overview** 




 We are building a centralized Digital Engineering team to design, develop, and scale enterprise digital platforms across web, mobile, and data ecosystems.
 



 This role begins with ownership of corporate websites built on a modern headless architecture (Next.js \+ Strapi) and will evolve to support web applications, internal platforms, BI integrations, and AI\-driven solutions.
 



  





**We are specifically seeking engineers who have actively leveraged Agentic AI tools across the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) in the past 12 months to accelerate delivery, improve quality, and reduce defects.** 




  





**This is not a traditional development role — this is an AI\-enabled engineering role.** 




  





**Key Responsibilities** 




**1\. Platform Development \& Ownership** 



* Develop and maintain enterprise web platforms using Next.js and TypeScript
* Build and manage content models in Strapi (Headless CMS)
* Create reusable UI components aligned with centralized design systems
* Ensure performance, accessibility, SEO, and security best practices



**2\. Full Stack Engineering** 



* Design and develop front end, APIs and backend data objects
* Integrate with enterprise systems and third\-party tools
* Contribute to CI/CD pipelines using GitHub workflows
* Support deployment, monitoring, and troubleshooting



**3\. Agile Delivery** 



* Participate in sprint planning, backlog refinement, and retrospectives
* Deliver features in iterative cycles
* Collaborate with design, infra, security, and business stakeholders



**4\. AI\-Assisted Engineering** 



* **Use Agentic AI tools to accelerate:**
* Code generation and scaffolding
* Test case creation
* Refactoring and documentation
* Rapid POC development
* Continuously improve engineering productivity using automation



**5\. Future Digital Initiatives** 



* Support development of internal web applications
* Contribute to data visualization / BI integrations
* Participate in future mobile and API\-based projects



  





**Primary Skills (Mandatory)** 



* Strong hands\-on experience in Next.js
* Proficiency in TypeScript
* Experience with Strapi CMS
* Experience with GitHub (branching strategy, pull requests, CI/CD)
* Backend development using .NET / Python / Node.js
* Strong understanding of REST APIs

**Secondary / Good\-to\-Have Skills** 



* Experience in Angular
* Backend development using .NET / Python / Node.js

* Knowledge of performance optimization



  





**Desired Competencies** 



* Strong problem\-solving mindset
* Ability to independently take ownership of features
* Comfort working in a fast\-paced Agile environment
* Ability to handle multiple digital initiatives simultaneously
* Proactive and innovation\-driven approach



  





**What Success Looks Like** 



* Reduced vendor dependency
* Faster feature turnaround
* Stable, scalable digital platforms
* Adoption of AI\-driven development practices
* Seamless support for future web \& application initiatives



  





**Why This Role is Strategic** 




 This position is foundational in building a centralized Digital Engineering capability within Corporate IT, enabling long\-term ownership, agility, and innovation across enterprise digital platforms.What’s in it for you?
 



  





**Be an equal parent** 




  





*Maternity support, including paid leave ahead of statutory guidelines, and flexible work options on return* 




  





*Paternity support, including paid leave* 




  





*New mothers can bring a caregiver and children under a year old, on work travel* 




  





*Adoption support; gender neutral and based on the primary caregiver, with paid leave options* 




  





**No place for discrimination at Godrej** 




  





*Gender\-neutral anti\-harassment policy* 




  





*Same sex partner benefits at par with married spouses* 




  





*Gender transition support* 




  





**We are selfish about your wellness** 




  





*Comprehensive health insurance plans, as well as accident coverage for you and your family, with top\-up options* 




  





*Trust based sick leave* 




  





*Mental wellness and self\-care programmes, resources and counselling* 




  





**Celebrating wins, the Godrej Way** 




  





*Structured recognition platforms for individual, team and business\-level achievements* 




  





*Performance\-based earning opportunities* 




  





 https://www.godrejcareers.com/benefits/
 



  





  





 An inclusive Godrej
 



  





 Before you go, there is something important we want to highlight. There is no place for discrimination at Godrej. Diversity is the philosophy of who we are as a company. And has been for over a century. It’s not just in our DNA and nice to do. Being more diverse \- especially having our team members reflect the diversity of our businesses and communities \- helps us innovate better and grow faster.  Join EY and help to build a better working world.

 We are the only professional services organization who has a separate business dedicated exclusively to the financial services marketplace. Join Risk and Compliance Engineering Team and you will work with multi\-disciplinary teams from around the world to deliver a global perspective. Aligned to key industry groups including Risk Management, Asset management, Banking and Capital Markets, Insurance and Private Equity we provide integrated advisory, assurance, tax, and transaction services. Through diverse experiences, world\-class learning and individually tailored coaching you will experience ongoing professional development. That’s how we develop outstanding leaders who team to deliver on our promises to all of our stakeholders, and in so doing, play a critical role in building a better working world for our people, for our clients and for our communities. Sound interesting? Well, this is just the beginning. Because whenever you join, however long you stay, the exceptional EY experience lasts a lifetime.
   

  

 We’re lookin
 **g** 
 for a Full\-stack Engineer (front\-end focussed) at EY GDS. You will work on designing and implementing modern web applications with a focus on front\-end development using Angular or React.js with TypeScript. You will collaborate with cross\-functional teams to build, deploy, and manage scalable back\-end services, APIs, and database integrations that meet business needs and leverage best practices in full\-stack development and cloud technologies. This is a fantastic opportunity to be part of a leading firm whilst being instrumental in the growth of a new service offering. We are the only professional services organization who has a separate business dedicated exclusively to the financial and non\-financial services marketplace. Join Digital Engineering team and you will work with multi\-disciplinary teams from around the world to deliver a global perspective.
   

  

 EY Risk and Compliance Engineering is a unique, industry\-focused business unit that provides a broad range of integrated services that leverage deep industry experience with strong functional capability and product knowledge. The Risk and Compliance Engineering (RCE) practice works with clients to analyse, formulate, design, mobilize and drive digital transformation initiatives. We advise clients on their most pressing digital challenges and opportunities surround business strategy, customer, growth, profit optimization, innovation, technology strategy, and digital transformation. We also have a unique ability to help our clients translate strategy into actionable technical design, and transformation planning/mobilization. Through our unique combination of competencies and solutions, EY’s RCE team helps our clients sustain competitive advantage and profitability by developing strategies to stay ahead of the rapid pace of change and disruption and supporting the execution of complex transformations.
   

  

**Your Key Responsibilities**
* Front\-End Development: Develop and maintain front\-end applications using Angular or React.js with TypeScript.
* API Integration: Collaborate in building and consuming REST APIs and GraphQL services.
* Back\-End Development: Contribute to development of back\-end technologies using Java, Python, or Node.js and databases (SQL/NoSQL).
* Code Quality: Participate in code reviews, write tests, and ensure maintainable, high\-quality code.
* Deployment: Work with CI/CD pipelines and support deployment activities.
* Collaboration: Collaborate with product managers, UX designers, and other engineers to deliver high\-quality end\-to\-end solutions.
* Technology Updates: Stay updated with emerging web technologies and apply best practices in performance and security.


**Skills And Attributes For Success**
**Required Skills:**
* Hands\-on experience with Angular or React.js and TypeScript.
* Solid understanding of HTML5, CSS3, and ES8\+.
* Knowledge of state management, component\-driven architecture, and responsive design.
* Exposure to Java, Python, or Node.js for back\-end development.
* Experience with REST APIs and GraphQL.
* Development experience with SQL and NoSQL databases.
* Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and related tools (Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, GitLab CI, etc.).
* Basic exposure to Docker and containerized deployments is a plus.


**Preferred Qualifications:**
* Agile Methodologies: Familiarity with Agile development practices and methodologies.
* Problem\-Solving: Strong analytical skills with the ability to troubleshoot and resolve complex issues.


**Education:**
**Degree:** 
 Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience
   

  

**What We Offer**
 EY Global Delivery Services (GDS) is a dynamic and truly global delivery network. We work across six locations – Argentina, China, India, the Philippines, Poland and the UK – and with teams from all EY service lines, geographies and sectors, playing a vital role in the delivery of the EY growth strategy. From accountants to coders to advisory consultants, we offer a wide variety of fulfilling career opportunities that span all business disciplines. In GDS, you will collaborate with EY teams on exciting projects and work with well\-known brands from across the globe. We’ll introduce you to an ever\-expanding ecosystem of people, learning, skills and insights that will stay with you throughout your career.
   

  

* Continuous learning: You’ll develop the mindset and skills to navigate whatever comes next.
* Success as defined by you: We’ll provide the tools and flexibility, so you can make a meaningful impact, your way.
* Transformative leadership: We’ll give you the insights, coaching and confidence to be the leader the world needs.
* Diverse and inclusive culture: You’ll be embraced for who you are and empowered to use your voice to help others find theirs.


**EY \| Building a better working world**
 EY is building a better working world by creating new value for clients, people, society and the planet, while building trust in capital markets.
   

  

 Enabled by data, AI and advanced technology, EY teams help clients shape the future with confidence and develop answers for the most pressing issues of today and tomorrow.
   

  

 EY teams work across a full spectrum of services in assurance, consulting, tax, strategy and transactions. Fueled by sector insights, a globally connected, multi\-disciplinary network and diverse ecosystem partners, EY teams can provide services in more than 150 countries and territories.

 DataFuel is an eCommerce automation and analytics platform powering real businesses at scale. Our systems process large volumes of production data and drive Decision making through reliable backend infrastructure and intelligent automation.
   

  

 We are a product\-first engineering team focused on building scalable systems, clean abstractions, and high\-performance services. We value engineers who think deeply, take ownership, and build with intent.

 We are looking for a Backend\-Focused Engineering Intern with strong fundamentals and curiosity for modern AI systems (agentic workflows, LLM\-based reasoning systems, etc.).
   

  

 This is not a “task\-based” internship — you will work on real production systems, contribute to core backend logic, and help build intelligent systems that interact with data, APIs, and automation pipelines.

 Strong fundamentals in Python

 Strong problem\-solving attitude

 Nice to Have (Bonus)

 Understanding of Docker / deployment basics

 What You’ll Gain

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
**Our Team:**


Technology drives our business. Our team is made up of talented software engineers, infrastructure engineers, leaders and UX professionals. We care about technology as a craft and a differentiator. We bring our global products to market with a mix of software, cloud, data centers, infrastructure, design and grit.

**The Role:**


At Morningstar, helping investors is what brings us together and drives our work. We are looking for a senior, front end focused full stack engineer whose core strength is building, enhancing and maintaining high quality user experiences with JavaScript/TypeScript and frameworks such as Ember, React, Vue. This role will take a leading part in shaping our UI architecture, front end engineering practices, and the overall product experience while also being comfortable partnering on (and occasionally building) .NET/.NET Core services and integrating with AWS\-based infrastructure. Every day you will collaborate with engineers, UX, and product managers to understand our domain and deliver solutions that empower our users. This position is based in our Mumbai office.

**Responsibilities**

* Lead development of user facing features with JavaScript/TypeScript and a front end framework (Ember.js/React/ Vue), delivering responsive, accessible, and performant experiences.
* Understand, navigate, and improve an existing complex codebasedebug issues across layers, refactor safely, and modernize incrementally without disrupting businesscritical workflows.
* Own front end architecture decisions (component design, state management, routing, API integration patterns), and drive consistency through reusable UI components and design systems.
* Build and maintain robust front end quality practices: unit/integration tests, linting, code review standards, CI pipelines, and observability for clientside issues.
* Optimize page performance and reliability (bundle size, rendering performance, caching, error handling, monitoring) across browsers and devices.
* Regularly interact with clients and external/internal stakeholders to clarify requirements, provide progress updates, demo features, and incorporate feedback into iterations.
* Collaborate closely with UX and Product to translate workflows into intuitive, technically sound interfaces, advocate for usability and accessibility best practices.
* Design, consume, and when needed implement RESTful APIs and services using C\# and .NET/.NET Core (Web API), partnering with other engineers to deliver end to end functionality.
* Work with AWS\-based services and deployments (e.g., CloudFront, S3, API Gateway, Lambda) as needed.
* Follow software engineering best practices such as continuous integration, test\-driven development, and regular deployments; contribute to Agile delivery using JIRA.
* Analyze and remediate production issues; build instrumentation and operational readiness into both front end and backend components.
* Stay up to date on emerging technologies and share learnings; mentor teammates and help raise the bar on engineering excellence.

**Requirements**

* Bachelor’s degree in computer science or a related field, with 5\-8 years of software development experience.
* Strong, hands\-on experience building production front end applications using JavaScript and TypeScript.
* Deep expertise in at least one modern frontend framework (Ember.js, Vue), including component architecture, state management, and routing.
* Demonstrated ability to quickly understand and be productive in a large, existing, and sometimes legacy codebase including debugging, identifying root causes, and making incremental improvements.
* Solid understanding of HTML5, CSS3, responsive design, browser APIs, and cross browser compatibility.
* Experience integrating front ends with RESTful APIs; ability to collaborate on API contracts and data models.
* Working knowledge of C\# and the Microsoft .NET/.NET Core stack, including building or extending Web APIs, understanding authentication/authorization, and troubleshooting service issues.
* Experience with testing practices: unit tests and integration tests (front end and/or back end), plus familiarity with CI/CD workflows.
* Understanding of web security fundamentals and how to protect applications from common vulnerabilities.
* Exposure to AWS services and patterns such as S3, CloudFront, API Gateway, Lambda, DynamoDB, WAF, VPC Link, and infrastructure\-as\-code (e.g., Terraform).
* Knowledge of object\-oriented design, domain modeling, design patterns, and building scalable and highly available systems.
* Comfortable in client\-facing discussions: able to ask clarifying questions, explain technical tradeoffs clearly, and align expectations with non\-technical audiences.
* Strong communication skills and ownership mindset; ability to work independently and deliver high\-quality results across multiple priorities.
* Experience working in Scrum/Agile methodologies is a plus.

title: Software Engineer (Full Stack)
description:
**Introduction**
 Our goal at Pivotree is to help accelerate the future of frictionless commerce. We will help lead this change over the next decade because we believe a future where technology is embedded intimately into all aspects of our everyday lives can benefit everyone and will shape the interactions with the brands we love. We will help shape the future of frictionless commerce by working together with some of the best brands in the world and some of the best people in the industry to leverage converging technologies that will make it possible to accelerate frictionless commerce faster than ever.
   

  

 Pivotree provides services focused on the design, implementation, management, and maintenance of complex ecommerce solutions for large enterprises. We provide the technical skills necessary to enable the effective use of technologies combined with the business context to leverage a solution to solve our clients' business challenges. We strive to fill the gaps in available technology with our own IP to reduce the barriers to adoption.
   

  

 We enable inclusive, immersive and highly personalized experiences for our clients and their customers. We build our products with a view to productizing and scaling technology to lower the costs and reduce the risks of implementing and managing our integrated solutions. Each of our solutions starts with reliable and reputable e\-commerce and MDM platforms, which run on enterprise grade infrastructure that are customized to meet a variety of client needs, situations, and budgets. Over the next 10 years we will add new categories and capabilities that will define frictionless commerce ecosystems.
   

  

 This is a journey of technology acceleration combined with consumer readiness and adoption. We are looking for people capable of adapting relentlessly to the rapidly evolving world around us.
   

  

**Job Summary**
 We are seeking a versatile Full Stack Developer to join our product development team. This role is responsible for the end\-to\-end lifecycle of web applications, from designing intuitive user interfaces (UI) to managing robust server\-side architecture and databases. The ideal candidate is a proactive problem\-solver who can navigate all layers of the technical stack to deliver high\-quality, scalable solutions.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Frontend Development: Design and implement responsive, visually appealing user interfaces using HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript. Develop single\-page applications (SPAs) leveraging frameworks like React.js, Angular, or Vue.js.
* Backend Development: Build and maintain scalable server\-side logic and APIs using Node.js, Python (Django/FastAPI), or Java (Spring Boot).
* Database Management: Design, optimize, and manage SQL (MySQL, PostgreSQL) and NoSQL (MongoDB) database schemas and queries.
* Deployment \& DevOps: Manage the complete software development process from conception to deployment. This includes containerization with Docker, setting up CI/CD pipelines (e.g., GitHub Actions), and monitoring application performance.
* Collaboration: Work closely with product managers, graphic designers, and other engineers in an Agile environment to translate requirements into functional code.
* Quality Assurance: Implement unit, integration, and end\-to\-end testing to ensure software reliability and security.


**Qualifications \& Skills** 
  

  

* Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
* Experience: Typically 3–5 years of professional experience in full stack roles.
* Core Technical Stack:
+ Languages: JavaScript (ES6\+), Python, or PHP.
+ Frameworks: React.js, Node.js/Express, and Java/Spring Boot.
+ Version Control: Experience with Git and Bitbucket.
+ Cloud Services: Basic to advanced knowledge of AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda) or Azure.

* Soft Skills: Strong analytical thinking, excellent communication, and the ability to mentor junior developers.


**Additional Preferred Experience**
* Familiarity with AI/ML integration, such as using LLMs or agentic frameworks (e.g., LangChain).
* Familiarity with AI Coding Assistants, such as GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, AmazonQ Developer, etc.
* Knowledge of specialized visualization libraries like D3\.js.


 Pivotree is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive and accessible workplace.

**What You’ll Bring To The Role**
* 4\+ years of hands\-on experience on Core Java, Spring, Spring Boot, Hibernate, TypeScript and JUnit.
* Should be able to write optimized, efficient, and clean code with deep expertise in modern UI technologies (Angular / React) and strong experience building microservices‑based backend systems.
* Strong Object\-Oriented Programming and Design Pattern concepts with practical experiencing of leveraging the same during development.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills.
* Candidate should be able to design and then implement solutions. \-
* Team player with strong attitude and work ethics.

* Candidate is expected to work with global teams and hence should be clear in both verbal and written communication.
* Write unit tests that exercise all major logic components of the code.

* Git/Git Hub \- Relational Database and SQL knowledge \- DB2/PostgreSQL/Oracle/Azure SQL \- Linux, Unix, Shell Scripting. \-
* Knowledge about Kubernetes, Containers,

 At Morgan Stanley, we raise, manage and allocate capital for our clients – helping them reach their goals. We do it in a way that’s differentiated – and we’ve done that for 90 years. Our values \- putting clients first, doing the right thing, leading with exceptional ideas, committing to diversity and inclusion, and giving back \- aren’t just beliefs, they guide the decisions we make every day to do what's best for our clients, communities and more than 80,000 employees in 1,200 offices across 42 countries. At Morgan Stanley, you’ll find an opportunity to work alongside the best and the brightest, in an environment where you are supported and empowered. Our teams are relentless collaborators and creative thinkers, fueled by their diverse backgrounds and experiences. We are proud to support our employees and their families at every point along their work\-life journey, offering some of the most attractive and comprehensive employee benefits and perks in the industry. There’s also ample opportunity to move about the business for those who show passion and grit in their work.
   

  

 To learn more about our offices across the globe, please copy and paste https://www.morganstanley.com/about\-us/global\-offices into your browser.

title: Web Developer
description:
**Company Description**


Global University Systems is an international education group that empowers students to transform their lives through education. We believe education drives careers, lives, and society forward, enabling a brighter future for all. Our network of 30 institutions offers the broadest range of industry\-relevant skills through inclusive, accessible, and digital\-first learning. We currently educate around 122,000 students on campuses worldwide and have 20M\+ unique subscribers to our courses. Our global ecosystem powers accessible digital learning and academic achievement.

**About Quallege**


Quallege is an international student recruitment platform that partners with leading U.S. universities to drive enrollment from global markets. We operate at the intersection of higher education and international marketing — working on behalf of our university partners to attract, engage, and convert students across key regions


Our work serves three primary audiences: **recruitment partners** (the agents and agencies on the ground in each market), **prospective students** (the end audience our campaigns are ultimately designed to reach), and **university partners** (the institutions we represent, who are active stakeholders in approvals and brand standards). Understanding how to communicate effectively and appropriately for each audience is central to every role on our team.


We are a global company with a local mindset. Some of our communications are market\-specific — tailored in tone, cultural context, or language for a particular region — while others follow a global approach applied consistently across all markets. The ability to navigate both is key.


Because we produce content on behalf of universities, our work must adhere to each institution's brand guidelines and is often subject to university approval workflows.

**Role Summary**


We are looking for a capable and detail\-oriented Web Developer to join Quallege’s marketing team. This is a hands\-on production role focused on two core areas: HTML email development and campaign landing pages. This role is responsible for marketing\-facing digital assets and ensuring our communications render correctly, track properly, and connect seamlessly with our CRM and marketing systems.


You bring solid front\-end fundamentals, a quality\-first mindset, and the ability to work across multiple concurrent projects. You understand how websites, forms, and digital assets integrate with CRM platforms, and you can act as an informed liaison between the marketing team and our agency when technical decisions arise.

**Key Responsibilities**

**HTML Email Production**

* Build responsive, cross\-client HTML email templates from design files or briefs using Stripo (or equivalent), coded for compatibility with Gmail, Outlook, Apple Mail, mobile clients and others
* Maintain and update a modular email template library covering campaign types: partner onboarding sequences, university\-specific announcements, event invitations, and newsletters.
* **Proactive template development:** Actively identify opportunities to templatize recurring email formats, spot inefficiencies in the current setup, and propose reusable structures before being asked.
* **Yield\-focused journeys** — beyond onboarding, they'll build nurture sequences aimed at moving students further down the funnel (application submission, deposit payment, enrollment confirmation, etc.). These are behaviourally triggered or stage\-based journeys, not just one\-off sends.
* Apply inline CSS and table\-based layouts following email\-safe coding standards; conduct pre\-send rendering QA across major clients and devices.
* Troubleshoot and resolve rendering issues, broken layouts, and display inconsistencies across clients and devices.
* Implement UTM parameters and ensure all links, tracking codes, and CTA elements are correctly configured before deployment.
* Coordinate with the Partner specialist, Copywriter and Design teams to receive brand assets (logos, imagery, fonts) and copy, then independently design and build production\-ready email outputs within agreed timelines.

**Landing Pages \& Web Assets**

* Build and maintain campaign landing pages using Landingi that are responsive, fast\-loading, and optimized for conversion — using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript as needed.
* Develop web assets including banners, event registration pages, partner\-facing pages, and promotional components.
* Implement on\-page SEO best practices (semantic HTML, meta tags, alt attributes, page speed considerations) in coordination with the Copywriter.
* Integrate forms, tracking pixels, and analytics tools (Google Analytics, Meta Pixel, or equivalent) into landing pages.

**CRM \& Systems Integration**

* Ensure web forms, landing pages, and email assets are correctly integrated with Quallege’s CRM (Salesforce or equivalent), passing lead and engagement data accurately.
* Understand and implement UTM and conversion tracking flows so that digital touchpoints feed cleanly into marketing dashboards and attribution reporting.
* Collaborate with the marketing team and external agency to troubleshoot data flow issues between web properties and CRM systems.
* Support the setup and QA of marketing automation workflows that connect email, landing page, and CRM data — working within platforms such as HubSpot, Salesforce Marketing Cloud, or equivalent.

**UX/UI Design \& Visual Execution**

* Independently design and build HTML emails and landing pages from brief or concept — owning the full process from visual layout and typography to final coded output, without relying on a separate designer.
* Apply UX/UI principles to produce digital assets that are visually polished, on\-brand, intuitive, and optimized for the intended audience — balancing aesthetic quality with technical performance.
* Create design mockups or wireframes in Figma (or equivalent) when needed prior to development, and work within brand guidelines to maintain visual consistency across all digital touchpoints.
* Apply accessibility best practices (WCAG standards) and mobile\-first design thinking to all email and landing page builds, ensuring outputs are functional and visually consistent across devices.

**Agency Liaison \& Standards**

* Act as an informed internal point of contact between the marketing team and the external web agency — understanding technical scopes, reviewing deliverables, and communicating requirements clearly.
* Review and QA agency outputs for marketing\-facing web changes, flagging issues and ensuring brand and functional consistency.
* Document email templates, landing page components, and integration configurations to build a reusable, maintainable asset library.
* Stay current on front\-end development trends, email standards, and CRM integration best practices.

**Qualifications \& Education**

**Required**

* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Web Development, Information Technology, or related field
* Equivalent professional experience considered in lieu of formal degree

**Desirable**

* Front\-end or web development certification
* UX/UI design coursework or qualification (e.g., Google UX Design Certificate, Interaction Design Foundation)

**Experience \& Skills**

**Essential**

* 3–5 years of professional front\-end or web development experience
* Proven, hands\-on experience building HTML email templates with inline CSS and table\-based layouts, including cross\-client QA
* Experience building and optimizing campaign landing pages for lead generation or conversion
* Strong command of HTML5, CSS3, and responsive design principles
* Working knowledge of JavaScript; familiarity with jQuery and ES6
* Demonstrated understanding of CRM integration: connecting web forms, landing pages, and email assets to CRM platforms (Salesforce or HubSpot preferred)
* Familiarity with marketing automation platforms and how they connect to web and email touchpoints
* Understanding of UTM tracking, Google Analytics (GA4\), and conversion pixel implementation
* Demonstrated ability to independently design and build digital assets (emails and landing pages) — strong visual sensibility with working knowledge of UX/UI principles and design tools (Figma or equivalent)
* Strong attention to detail and a quality\-first approach to testing and QA
* Portfolio demonstrating HTML email work, landing pages, and digital marketing assets

**Desirable**

* Experience with email rendering QA tools (Litmus or Email on Acid); hands\-on familiarity with Stripo and Landingi is a strong plus
* Hands\-on experience with Salesforce Marketing Cloud, HubSpot, or Mailchimp
* Familiarity with CMS platforms (WordPress or similar)
* Knowledge of accessibility standards (WCAG 2\.1\)
* Experience working alongside or managing relationships with external web agencies
* Exposure to international or multicultural digital marketing environments

*The post holder may be asked to undertake additional duties in line with business requirements. All employees are expected to uphold Quallege’s values and comply with company policies, including those related to equality, diversity, inclusion, and safeguarding.*

**Other Information**


Please note this position is only available on our consultancy agreement.


Global University Systems equal opportunity employer. We provide equal opportunities and are committed to the principle of equality regardless of race, ancestry, place of origin, colour, ethnic origin, citizenship, creed, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, record of offences, marital status, family status or disability. The post holder may be asked to undertake different or additional duties in line with business requirements at the request of their line manager.
